'''Gondry''' was an [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and partner of the [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Djas Puhr/Legends|Djas Puhr]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] Gondry was sent with Djas to [[Datar/Legends|Datar]] by [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] to kidnap seven [[Ghostling]]s for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]]. When they arrived on Datar it didn't take long to find a [[Unidentified Ghostling village|Ghostling camp]], however they were attacked on their way out and Gondry was wounded by the impact of multiple arrows. Despite his injuries, the mercenary survived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]''
*''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''
*''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]''
